type: Correction (no new features; lint fix + consumer compat)

lintCorrection.preExistingNotes: The +3 vs K25-C errors are all 'Unexpected any' in pre-existing audit scripts (e.g., audit-k25-c-schema-implementation-scope.ts, audit-semester-query-scoping.ts). These are part of the pre-existing lint debt and are NOT introduced by K25-D1.
selfLintFixes: verify-schedule-api-response-compat-k25-d1.ts: removed require('fs') usage, replaced with readdirSync top-level import

consumersFixed.before: const data = await res.json(); set({ scheduleItems: data })
consumersFixed.after: const data = await res.json(); const items = Array.isArray(data) ? data : data.items ?? []; set({ scheduleItems: items })
consumersFixed.notes: Defensive pattern: accepts both wrapped shape and raw array
